zones.name: Enterprise IT
zones.description: Corporate and business systems (ERP, email, internet-facing services)

zones.name: OT DMZ
zones.description: Boundary services between IT and OT (jump hosts, historians, boundary monitoring)

zones.name: OT Operations
zones.description: Supervisory operations including SCADA/HMI and site-level OT visibility

zones.name: OT Control
zones.description: Basic control systems such as PLCs and industrial controllers

zones.name: Physical Process
zones.description: Physical process components such as sensors and actuators
